# extendTokenExpires

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for extendTokenExpires

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useExtendTokenExpiresMutation(); mutate({ input: { amount: '<IntervalInput>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useExtendTokenExpiresMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useExtendTokenExpiresMutation();
mutate({ input: { amount: '<IntervalInput>' } });
```
